creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Wesley,

Tue, Dec 23, 2008 at 09:29:09AM -0500, Wesley Shields wrote:
> On Tue, Dec 23, 2008 at 09:40:55AM +0300, Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> > I will patch more machines today and will watch for their behaviour.
> > More testing is always welcome, but I think that at Wednesday the patch
> > could be commited if no one will discover anything very bad.
> 
> I'll be traveling all day Wednesday and will likely not be able to
> commit this until Monday.  I'll try and get to it as soon as I return.

In principle, all my patched machines are stable already for a day, so
you can patch the port now.  Or leave for Monday -- as you prefer.

Thanks!
-- 
Eygene
 _                ___       _.--.   #
 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
    {_.-``-'         {_/            #
